data.title: Volatus Aerospace Expands Global Training Network Through Strategic Partnership with University of Technology, Jamaica
data.description: Volatus Aerospace has announced its expansion of the global training network by forming a strategic partnership with the University of Technology in Jamaica. This partnership will offer diverse training opportunities in the aerospace industry, catering to a wider audience. The collaboration will provide access to specialized courses and workshops for students, professionals, and enthusiasts alike. This move is part of Volatus Aerospace's goal to reach a larger audience globally and contribute to the growth and development of the aerospace sector.

data.title: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta Platforms $9 Trillion AI Moonshot Could Unlock Massive Executive Paydays If The Bet Pays Off
data.description: Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META) has recently unveiled a new stock option program wherein top executives stand to receive substantial payouts if the company manages to reach a market capitalization of $9 trillion by 2031. This ambitious target signals a potential 500% increase from the company's current valuation of around $1.5 trillion. The program, considered one of the most daring compensation structures in the tech industry, includes senior leaders such as CTO Andrew Bosworth, CPO Chris Cox, COO Javier Olivan, CFO Susan Li, CLO C.J. Mahoney, and Vice Chairman Dina Powell McCormick. Notably, CEO Mark Zuckerberg is excluded from this program. The details from public filings indicate that executives will only unlock the full value of these options if the company achieves the defined milestone.

data.title: Bitcoin Holds $71,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Test Breakout Levels
data.description: Bitcoin remains steady around $71,000 amid positive market sentiment in the cryptocurrency space. Bitcoin ETFs experienced a net outflow of $66.7 million on Tuesday, while Ethereum ETFs saw $40.8 million in net outflows. The current prices of major cryptocurrencies are: Bitcoin at $71,846, Ethereum at $2,195.01, Solana at $92.56, XRP at $1.42, Dogecoin at $0.09687, and Shiba Inu at $0.056186. Additionally, Meme coin market capitalization saw a 1.3% increase in the last 24 hours. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Why Velo3D Shares Are Sliding Wednesday?
data.description: Velo3D Inc (NASDAQ: VELO) saw a decline in shares on Wednesday following the release of their fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on Tuesday. The company reported fourth-quarter revenue of $9.44 million, exceeding expectations of $8.68 million. Their adjusted loss per share was 54 cents, slightly better than the anticipated 56 cents loss. 3D printer and parts revenue dropped by 5% compared to the previous year, attributed to product mix and system sales volume. System sales are expected to be the main revenue driver in 2026. Velo3D's backlog stood at $31 million by the end of the year, with CEO Arun Jeldi highlighting a record for bookings in the quarter. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Pew Policy Tool Shows States Taking Action to Boost Distributed Energy Resources
data.description: Between 2021 and 2025, state legislatures nationwide made significant progress in promoting localized energy solutions to address the increasing pressure on the grid. In Washington, as of March 25, 2026, Brian Watts, a member of The Pew Charitable Trusts' energy modernization initiative, emphasized the rising demand for energy in the United States.
